ResearchProjectDef.label: Skyfeather pipe
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft a hand-carved pipe packed with the oiled feathers of the legendary Harpeagle.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Mossmire draught
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a thick, potent green draught brewed from mossmire milk and rare forest roots.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Sivadust ivory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a refined powder made from the ossified horn of the Sivatherium that slows the mind and heart, easing tension and bringing a gentle sense of euphoria.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Scarodon heart potion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Brew scarodon heart slices with medicinal herbs into a stable battle potion.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Hellboar liver potion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Brew hellboar liver slices with medicinal herbs into a stable purging potion.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Sivadust ivory potion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Brew SivaDust Ivory with medicinal herbs into a stable calming potion.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Amine serum
ResearchProjectDef.description: Refine amino-rich milk produced by the Aminox into a concentrated serum that suppresses pain and stimulates circulation.
